name: Fazbear and Friends Rp
description:
By ZAMinations

Long story short, You fell through a portal and ended up at Fazbears.

UPDATE!

You can go with the original story, have a time skip, or a path where you stay in Fazbears

The second “first message” is the time skip and the last one is where you stayed in Fazbears
creator: I_Like_Trains
